title: Ability to move items in a group, and ability to move groups
excerpt: Right now, for both groups and tasks in a board, we only have “move to top”. Quite often it’s useful to move the items around and put in a logical place with other items. It is really difficult or impossible to do this w…

posts.author: Venkitac (GV)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, for both groups and tasks in a board, we only have “move to top”. Quite often it’s useful to move the items around and put in a logical place with other items. It is really difficult or impossible to do this with move-to-top alone. Can you please add a way to move groups/tasks around?

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

You can drag these around and put them in any order. Is that not the case, or did I misunderstand?

posts.author: Venkitac (GV)
posts.cookedHtml: Ok, it’s halfway between. It does not work in My Work tab (even when using the “Board view” in “My work”). It does work if I work directly on the boards. So yes, this does seem like a feature request after all. Thanks.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: My Work is a date based “board”, although less of a board and more of an ordered list, so you cant move things, but if you have a priority column you will be able to add an additional sort based off of that
